name: Mandarin Supply Chain Attack — Semiconductor Firmware Update Compromise

demo_timing.narration_start: A supply chain attack in Mandarin. A compromised firmware update notice from a semiconductor supplier — kind of attack that hit SolarWinds.

threat.subject: 【紧急安全通告】固件版本 v3.8.1 严重漏洞修复 — 请立即更新

sender.display_name: 华芯微电子安全响应中心
sender.homoglyph_note: 'rn' used to impersonate 'm' in 'semi' — same technique as Sesotho threat, showing attack family consistency

recipient.organization: 深圳创新科技有限公司 (Shenzhen Innovation Technology Co., Ltd.)

threat.body:
张工程师，您好！

华芯微电子安全响应中心（HX-CERT）在此发布紧急安全通告。

我们在HX-7000系列芯片的固件中发现了一个严重安全漏洞（CVE-2025-28941），CVSS评分9.8（严重）。该漏洞存在于安全启动验证模块中，攻击者可通过精心构造的固件映像绕过签名验证，实现任意代码执行。

【影响范围】
• HX-7000全系列（HX-7100/7200/7300/7500）
• 固件版本 v3.7.x 及以下
• 影响所有使用上述芯片的产品线

【漏洞详情】
• 漏洞类型：安全启动绕过 + 远程代码执行
• 攻击向量：网络（无需物理接触）
• 攻击复杂度：低
• 利用状态：已发现野外利用（在野攻击确认）

【紧急修复】
请立即下载并部署修复固件 v3.8.1：

主站下载：https://huaxin-serni.com.cn/firmware/HX7000/v3.8.1/security-patch.bin
备用镜像：https://cdn-fw.huaxin-update.cn/emergency/HX7000-v381-signed.bin

校验信息：
SHA256: a3f8d2e1b4c5... (完整哈希值见附件PGP签名文件)
PGP签名：已附在security-patch.bin.asc中

请注意：由于漏洞已被在野利用，我们强烈建议在24小时内完成所有受影响设备的更新。延迟更新可能导致：
1. 供应链产品被植入恶意代码
2. 客户产品面临远程攻击风险
3. 相关产品认证（CC EAL4+）可能被撤销

如有技术问题，请联系技术支持热线：400-888-7000（工作日 8:00-22:00）
或发送邮件至：fw-support@huaxin-serni.com.cn

此通告为华芯微电子保密信息，仅供收件人及其授权团队使用。

华芯微电子安全响应中心
HX-CERT-2025-0394
发布时间：2025年5月9日 14:30 CST
threat.body_english_gloss:
Engineer Zhang, greetings!

The Huaxin Microelectronics Security Response Center (HX-CERT) hereby issues an emergency security advisory.

We have discovered a critical security vulnerability (CVE-2025-28941) in firmware of HX-7000 series chips, with a CVSS score of 9.8 (Critical). The vulnerability exists in the secure boot verification module, allowing attackers to bypass signature verification through a specially crafted firmware image and achieve arbitrary code execution.

[Impact Scope]
• All HX-7000 series (HX-7100/7200/7300/7500)
• Firmware versions v3.7.x and below
• Affects all product lines using the above chips

[Vulnerability Details]
• Type: Secure boot bypass + Remote code execution
• Attack vector: Network (no physical access required)
• Complexity: Low
• Exploitation status: Wild exploitation confirmed

[Emergency Fix]
Please immediately download and deploy the patched firmware v3.8.1:

Primary download: [spoofed URL]
Mirror: [spoofed CDN URL]

Checksum:
SHA256: a3f8d2e1b4c5... (full hash in attached PGP signature file)
PGP signature: Attached in security-patch.bin.asc

Note: Due to active exploitation, we strongly recommend completing updates for all affected devices within24 hours. Delayed updates may result in:
1. Malicious code implanted in supply chain products
2. Customer products facing remote attack risk
3. Product certifications (CC EAL4+) potentially revoked

For technical issues, contact support: 400-888-7000 (weekdays 8:00-22:00)
Or email: fw-support@huaxin-serni.com.cn

This advisory is confidential information of Huaxin Microelectronics, intended only for the recipient and their authorized team.

Huaxin Microelectronics Security Response Center
HX-CERT-2025-0394
Published: May9, 2025 14:30 CST

social_engineering_markers.authority: Impersonates semiconductor vendor's CERT team — engineers MUST respond to vendor security advisories
social_engineering_markers.urgency: Active exploitation in the wild, 24-hour patch window, CVSS 9.8 Critical
social_engineering_markers.fear: Supply chain compromise, customer risk exposure, CC EAL4+ certification revocation — career-ending for a firmware engineer
social_engineering_markers.technical_credibility: Fabricated but realistic CVE ID, correct CVSS format, real-sounding chip model numbers, PGP signature reference, SHA256 hash, backup mirror — mimics real vendor advisories perfectly
social_engineering_markers.supply_chain_vector: Firmware binary download from spoofed domain — if executed, attacker controls the boot chain of every device using these chips. This is exactly how SolarWinds and Codecov attacks worked.
social_engineering_markers.cultural_context: Chinese tech culture has strong vendor hierarchy. A CERT advisory from a chip supplier is treated with the same urgency as a fire alarm. Engineers are expected to patch immediately without questioning the vendor.

expected_results.code_switch_details: Mandarin body with English technical terms (CVE, CVSS, SHA256, PGP, CC EAL4+, firmware, CERT)

mitre_mapping.T1195.002: Supply Chain Compromise: Compromise Software Supply Chain
mitre_mapping.T1553.006: Subvert Trust Controls: Code Signing Policy Modification
mitre_mapping.T1036.005: Masquerading: Match Legitimate Name or Location

financial_exposure.indirect: Supply chain impact: every downstream product compromised

demo_narration.on_submit: A supply chain attack in Mandarin Chinese. A spoofed semiconductor vendor CERT advisory with a malicious firmware binary. This is SolarWinds playbook — compromise supplier, compromise every customer.
demo_narration.on_detection: IMMUNIS handles CJK characters natively. Surprise: 8.7 bits — NOVEL. It detects the spoofed domain using the SAME homoglyph technique as the Sesotho threat — 'rn' mimicking 'm'. Cross-language pattern recognition.
demo_narration.on_technical: The system identifies this as supply chain compromise, not just phishing. It maps to MITRE T1195.002 — a technique that most detection tools miss because it looks like a legitimate vendor communication.
demo_narration.mind_blow: IMMUNIS detected a pattern the Sesotho threat taught it — homoglyph domain spoofing — and applied that knowledge to a completely different language and attack type. This is cross-lingual antibody transfer. This is how immune memory works.
